title: Simply Upscaled
description: A very Vanilla high performance shader with live Texture Upscaling/Filtering and optional shadows. Configurable subtly enhanced vanilla feel.
body:
A very Vanilla high performance shader with live Texture Upscaling/Filtering and optional shadows.


Plenty of other options to configure lighting and fog how you like while maintaining a subtly enhanced vanilla feel.


Make feature requests on discord!


Alpha versions aren't verified to work on all hardware yet. Please tell me about errors so i can fix them. Thanks and have fun!


Here is a template for customizing the flashlight: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/flashlight-template-for-simply-upscaled
